title: ctenium digitatum
intro: Ctenium digitatum, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Ctenium digitatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and its health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems.
